## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go build ./cmd/api ./cmd/worker ./cmd/migrate`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs or Swagger output when API behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I considered security, privacy, and secret-handling impact.
- [ ] I did not commit `.env`, local databases, build artifacts, API keys, or provider credentials.
